svg.metadata: {"_description":"Classic three-tier web app: User → CDN/LB → web → API → DB, with cache off to the side.","type":"flow","title":"three-tier web app","nodes":[{"id":"user","label":"User","kind":"ellipse"},{"id":"cdn","label":"CDN","kind":"rectangle"},{"id":"lb","label":"Load\nBalancer","kind":"rectangle"},{"id":"web","label":"Web Server","kind":"rectangle"},{"id":"api","label":"API","kind":"rectangle","accent":"accent"},{"id":"cache","label":"Cache","kind":"note","background":"highlight"},{"id":"db","label":"Database","kind":"rectangle"}],"edges":[{"from":"user","to":"cdn","label":"static"},{"from":"user","to":"lb","label":"dynamic"},{"from":"lb","to":"web"},{"from":"web","to":"api","label":"REST"},{"from":"api","to":"cache","label":"lookup","kind":"dashed"},{"from":"api","to":"db","label":"query"}]}
